CustomField.description: Controls whether NPPatch rollup calculations use Dated Conversion Rates when Advanced Currency Management (ACM) is enabled. When checked, rollups use the exchange rate effective on the Opportunity close date. When unchecked, rollups use the static default exchange rate for each currency. Has no effect if ACM is not enabled. Disabled by default.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Use Dated Conversion Rates for rollups when Advanced Currency Management is enabled. If unchecked, rollups use the default static exchange rate.
CustomField.label: Use Dated Conversion Rates if available
